scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n storage,vite -c cyan,magenta "cross-env STORAGE_BRIDGE_HOST=0.0.0.0 node --watch ./storage-bridge.mjs" "npm run dev --prefix ./frontend"
scripts.nodered:stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$line = (netstat -ano | Select-String 'LISTENING' | Select-String ':1880' | Select-Object -First 1); if ($line) { $procId = (($line.ToString() -split '\s+')[-1]); try { $p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \"ProcessId = $procId\"; if ($p -and $p.CommandLine -match 'node-red') { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force; Write-Output \"Stopped Node-RED PID $procId\" } else { Write-Output \"Port 1880 used by non Node-RED PID $procId\" } } catch { Write-Output \"Could not stop PID $procId\" } } else { Write-Output 'No listener on 1880' }"
scripts.nodered:env:restart: npm run nodered:stop && npm run nodered:env
